title: [MTR4] JR Trains Pack with Working Displays
description: [With working display implemented!] This Resource Pack adds Japanese Railway Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
This pack adds several JR (Japan Railways) trains with working displays.

# IMPORTANT NOTE

This resource pack and models are originally created by [Soodari](https://modrinth.com/user/Soodari). **I made literally no modifications** to the original train model itself. This pack just lets the trains to display their destinations and next stations depending on the train model.

If you are already using the original one, you should replace the original pack with this. You don't have to set up your depots again since the train names are the same. (I don't have enough knowledge to just add displays like an addon resource pack, sorry)

## Attentions

- Kiha 54 series are not able to display destination. This is just because there's no room to display them.
- I'm not planning to backport this pack for MTR3.X. If you really need to one, do it yourself (and distribute on modrinth if you like :-)).

For further information of this pack, visit the original model link.

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr34jr-trains-pack

## Contents

- JR 211/415 Series (Shonan livery, Boso, Nagano, 415-Kyushu livery for MTR3 Version)
  - With working external displays
- JR Kiha 54 Series
  - With no modifications!
- JR 203 Series
  - With working external displays
- JR E231-500 Series (Yamanote, Chuo-Sobu livery)
  - With working external and internal displays
